reason: A washed-up rock trio’s behind-the-scenes reunion reveals old wounds as they chase one last encore.
A driven singer turns down fame, then reunites with past collaborators for a soulful, bittersweet finale.
A boy band dreams of second chances until a mysterious force reunites them for a show-stopping concert.
A punk-metal band’s offer to headline one night stirs decades of rivalries and band-bonding catharsis.
An experimental fertility specialist invites old lab partners back for one test that will change every relationship.
A legacy rock act reunites for a high-stakes gig, confronting egos, regrets, and riffs they can no longer avoid.
Two would-be stars return to the stage for a charity gig, dragging past dreams and resentments into the spotlight.
Hobbling into a comeback special, an avant-garde cult band finds their fractured friendships echo louder than amps.
A grieving bassist and estranged drummer reunite backstage for one final show, facing solo fears and shared history.
A one-off reunion tour of a 90s techno-pop band ignites old passions, technocratic regrets, and neon redemption.
